name: Thai Hot & Sour Shrimp Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Stalks Lemongrass, cut into 2-inch pieces and smashed. Use only the base; discard the leaves
1/2 cup Canned straw mushrooms, or fresh
2 teaspoons Optional: fresh sliced red and green chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring water to a boil over high heat.
2. Stir in the curry paste, kaffir lime leaves, and lemongrass. Bring to a boil again.
3. Add shrimp and mushrooms, cooking just until the shrimp are done but not overcooked.
4. Stir in fish sauce and remove from heat.
5. Spoon the soup into serving bowls.
6. Add lime juice, stirring well.
7. Sprinkle chilies and cilantro leaves before serving.
8. Serve hot with cooked rice. Makes 2 servings.
NOTE: Boneless chicken pieces may be used instead of shrimp. Omit the chilies if desired. Additional fish sauce may also be added to the soup at the table.
